holdings.infoBox: EEMA is an equity ETF with a total of 916 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 14.48%, Samsung Electronics at 5.10%, SK hynix at 3.84%, Tencent Holdings at 3.68%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 2.37%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Emerging Markets Asia ETF (EEMA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EM Asia Custom Capped index, a market-cap-weighted index of Asian emerging markets firms. EEMA was launched on Feb 8, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.text: The dollar selloff is helping developing countries' stocks.

data.text: Courtney Garcia, Payne Capital Management senior wealth advisor, joins 'Power Lunch' to discuss finding opportunities in emerging markets.

data.title: Emerging Markets Are Taking a Hit From China
data.text: The takeaway for investors: tread carefully, not just in Chinese stocks but also the broader emerging markets.

data.title: Protectionism 'Ironically' Boosting Emerging Markets: Pacific Life's Gokhman
data.text: Max Gokhman, head of asset allocation at Pacific Life Fund Advisors, says intra-emerging market trade is rising at a 'very rapid clip' due to the rise of protectionist policy measure from U.S.

data.title: JPM's Kelly Says Put an Extra Chip on the Table in EM Bets
data.text: David Kelly, chief global strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, explains why he expects emerging market equities to do well in the case of a U.S.-China trade agreement.
